title: Get user requests directly on your website and have an agent build
abstract: Get user requests directly on your website and have an agent build is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles ...
abstract_zh: 给你的网站安利个神器——Get user requests directly on your website and have an agent build！这货简直就是效率杀手啊！想象下写周报时，再也不怕老板突然问：“这个数据为啥没更新？”有了它，客户的需求直接弹窗，你就能秒变“超人”，效率爆棚！比其他工具强在哪儿？它能实时捕捉用户需求，一键生成回复模板，让你从键盘奴解放出来。调Bu
